content: Jon H.M. Chan

title: Bento
content: I am an artist and founder using storytelling and AI to deepen human connection at scale.

title: Bento
content: Previously, I led engineering for Stack Overflow's community Q&A product with 100M monthly users. I joined as an early engineer and left after it was acquired for $1.8B.

title: Bento
content:
My belief is that we are put on this earth for meaningful connection. Money, power, and fame mean nothing if you're alone and living outside of your values.
